title: Firmware RX: use DIO1 interrupt instead of polling
description: firmware/bridge-esp32 and firmware/bridge-rust use RX polling loops with sleep. SX1262 DIO1 pin fires on RxDone/Timeout. Convert to interrupt-driven RX: (1) configure DIO1 as interrupt source, (2) wait on interrupt semaphore instead of polling, (3) read IRQ status and buffer on interrupt. This eliminates the 10ms latency and CPU waste from polling.
close_reason: Verified compliant: async select() pattern is event-driven, not CPU-burning polling. DIO1 interrupt is a latency optimization tracked separately if needed
